---
name: Threat Report
about: Report a new adversarial failure mode or exploit surface
title: '[THREAT] '
labels: threat
assignees: ''
---

## Threat description
<!-- What is the mechanism? How does a bad actor exploit this? -->

## Affected section / clause
<!-- Which article, founding-order rule, annex, patch, or threat does this affect? -->

## Impact assessment
<!-- What happens if this exploit succeeds? Who is harmed? -->

## Proposed mitigation direction
<!-- Not required, but helpful. What would close this gap? -->

## Real-world parallel
<!-- Is there a comparable case in existing systems? -->
